scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts src/cli.ts --format esm --dts --clean && node -e "process.platform !== 'win32' && require('fs').chmodSync('dist/cli.js', 0o755)"
scripts.test: pnpm run build && (node -e "require('fs').existsSync('../../target/debug/brokerd')" || cargo build --manifest-path ../../Cargo.toml -p msg-runtime --bin brokerd) && vitest run
